<!-- Generated by pipeline Step 13 - do not edit manually -->
<!-- Source: HLD §3.1 ingestion pipeline, ADR-4 Scenario A/B/C, OAQ-1/OAQ-6. Activities are real ingestion steps only. -->

# Activity Diagram — Ingestion Pipeline (ingest_document)

```mermaid
flowchart TB
    START([PDF uploaded]) --> HASH[Compute content hash]
    HASH --> DEDUP{Hash already<br/>ingested?}
    DEDUP -->|yes & retained| REUSE[Reuse existing doc_id<br/>return 200 deduplicated]
    DEDUP -->|no or no-retention| PARSEA[PyMuPDF get_toc Scenario A]
    PARSEA --> HASTOC{Native<br/>bookmarks?}
    HASTOC -->|yes| TOC[Build TOC level/title/pages]
    HASTOC -->|no| PARSEB[Unstructured.io headers Scenario B]
    PARSEB --> HEADERS{Headers<br/>detected?}
    HEADERS -->|yes| PSEUDO[LLM pseudo-TOC<br/>Claude 3 Haiku]
    HEADERS -->|no| PARSEC[Azure OCR Scenario C]
    PARSEC --> STRUCT{Usable<br/>structure?}
    STRUCT -->|no| FBONLY[Set fallback_only = true<br/>no section rows]
    STRUCT -->|yes| PSEUDO
    PSEUDO --> TOC
    TOC --> CHUNK[Section-aware chunking<br/>no cross-section chunk]
    FBONLY --> CHUNK
    CHUNK --> EMBED[Embed chunks<br/>text-embedding-3-small / BGE-M3]
    EMBED --> UPSERT[Upsert vectors to Qdrant<br/>+ section rows to Postgres]
    UPSERT --> RETAIN{no_retention?}
    RETAIN -->|yes| PURGE[Purge raw + chunks + sections<br/>ephemeral, FR-027]
    RETAIN -->|no| STORE[Store raw in object storage]
    PURGE --> DONE([Return doc_id + toc])
    STORE --> DONE
    REUSE --> DONE
```

> Tiered A->B->C degradation and the OAQ-1 no-retention purge path are exactly as in HLD §3.1 / ADR-4. Truncation note: not applicable (< 50 nodes).
